hypothesis: If crystal structures are encoded jointly as graphs, RoboCrystallographer text, and simulated XRD patterns and trained with cross-modal prediction plus VIC and contrastive objectives, then downstream prediction of band gap, shear/bulk moduli, dielectric constant, and perovskite formation energy will achieve lower MAE than CGCNN, CoGN, and ALIGNN on Matbench and AFLOW splits because aligning modalities in a shared latent space captures complementary structural information.
